modpacks.subtitle: Install or replace the modpack running on this server.

install_modal.title: Install {{name}}
install_modal.warning_world: Updating a modpack may corrupt your world. Back up your server first.
install_modal.no_versions: No version available for this modpack.

purge.label: Delete all server files before installing

uninstall_modal.title: Uninstall {{name}}?
uninstall_modal.warning: All server files will be permanently deleted, then the server will be reinstalled fresh on its original egg. This is irreversible — back up any worlds first. The server will be unreachable for a few minutes.

missing_api_key.hint: {{provider}} requires an admin-managed API key before it can be used. Ask your panel administrator to configure it.

empty.title: No modpack matches your filters.
empty.description: Try a different provider, broaden the version filter, or change the search terms.

eligibility.help: Ask your panel administrator to whitelist this server's egg in the modpack settings.

errors.provider_not_configured: This provider is not configured by the administrator yet.
errors.server_not_eligible: This server type is not allowed to install modpacks.
errors.installation_in_progress: An operation is already in progress on this server.
errors.permission_denied: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.modpacks.errors.permission_denied: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.provider_unreachable: The provider is unreachable. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.search_failed: We couldn't load modpacks. Try again in a few seconds.
